# inti

The ‘inti’ package is part of the ‘inkaverse’ project for developing
different procedures and tools used in plant science and experimental
designs. The mean aim of the package is to support researchers during
the planning of experiments and data collection ‘tarpuy()’, data
analysis and graphics ‘yupana()’, and technical writing. Learn more
about the ‘inkaverse’ project at <https://inkaverse.com/>.

## Installation

To install the stable version from
[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=inti):

``` r
install.packages("inti")
```

To install the latest development version directly from
[GitHub](https://github.com/flavjack/inti):

``` r
if (!require("remotes"))
  install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("flavjack/inti")
```

If you need install an specific version:

``` r
if (!require("remotes"))
  install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_version("inti", version = "0.4.4")
```

## Shiny apps

If is the first time running any of the apps consider install the app
dependencies:

``` r
inti::yupana(dependencies = TRUE)
```

After install the package and the app dependencies also you can access
to the apps through the Addins list in Rstudio or running the following
code:

### Yupana

``` r
inti::yupana()
```

### Tarpuy

``` r
inti::tarpuy()
```

# Package index

## Yupana

Data analysis

- [`yupana()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/yupana.md) : Interactive
  data analysis
- [`yupana_analysis()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/yupana_analysis.md)
  : Fieldbook analysis report
- [`yupana_export()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/yupana_export.md)
  : Graph options to export
- [`yupana_import()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/yupana_import.md)
  : Import information from data summary
- [`yupana_mvr()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/yupana_mvr.md) :
  Multivariate Analysis
- [`yupana_reshape()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/yupana_reshape.md)
  : Fieldbook reshape
- [`plot_diag()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/plot_diag.md) :
  Diagnostic plots
- [`plot_diagnostic()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/plot_diagnostic.md)
  : Diagnostic plots
- [`plot_raw()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/plot_raw.md) : Plot raw
  data
- [`plot_smr()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/plot_smr.md) : Plot
  summary data

## Tarpuy

Experimental designs

- [`tarpuy()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/tarpuy.md) : Interactive
  fieldbook designs
- [`tarpuy_design()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/tarpuy_design.md)
  : Fieldbook experimental designs
- [`tarpuy_plex()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/tarpuy_plex.md) :
  Fieldbook plan information
- [`tarpuy_plotdesign()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/tarpuy_plotdesign.md)
  : Fieldbook plot experimental designs
- [`tarpuy_traits()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/tarpuy_traits.md)
  : Field book traits

## Rticles

Write technical documents

- [`figure2qmd()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/figure2qmd.md) :
  Figure to Quarto format
- [`gdoc2qmd()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/gdoc2qmd.md) : Google
  docs to Rmarkdown
- [`table2qmd()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/table2qmd.md) : Table
  to Quarto format
- [`figure2rmd()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/figure2rmd.md) :
  Figure to Rmarkdown format
- [`table2rmd()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/table2rmd.md) : Table
  to Rmarkdown format
- [`include_pdf()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/include_pdf.md) :
  Include PDF in markdown documents
- [`include_table()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/include_table.md)
  : Table with footnotes
- [`footnotes()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/footnotes.md) :
  Footnotes in tables
- [`web_table()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/web_table.md) : HTML
  tables for markdown documents

## Plant breeding

Algorithms and calculations

- [`H2cal()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/H2cal.md) : Broad-sense
  heritability in plant breeding
- [`metamorphosis()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/metamorphosis.md)
  : Transform fieldbooks based in a dictionary
- [`outliers_remove()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/outliers_remove.md)
  : Remove outliers
- [`remove_outliers()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/remove_outliers.md)
  : Remove outliers using mixed models
- [`mean_comparison()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/mean_comparison.md)
  : Mean comparison test
- [`design_noreps()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/design_noreps.md)
  : Experimental design without replications
- [`design_repblock()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/design_repblock.md)
  : Experimental design in CRD and RCBD

## Datasets

- [`potato`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/potato.md) : Water use
  efficiency in 15 potato genotypes
- [`met`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/met.md) : Swedish cultivar
  trial data

## Miscellaneous

- [`split_folder()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/split_folder.md) :
  Split folder
- [`jc_tombola()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/jc_tombola.md) :
  Journal Club Tombola
- [`colortext()`](https://inkaverse.com/reference/colortext.md) :
  Colourise text for display in the terminal

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Apps](https://inkaverse.com/articles/apps.md):

  inti: interactive apps.

- [Broad-sense heritability in plant
  breeding](https://inkaverse.com/articles/heritability.md):

  How to calculate the heritability in plant breeding.

- [Inkaverse Privacy Policy](https://inkaverse.com/articles/policy.md):

- [Rticles](https://inkaverse.com/articles/rticles.md):

  Rticles: scientific documents with R.

- [Tarpuy](https://inkaverse.com/articles/tarpuy.md):

  Tarpuy: field-book experimental plans.

- [Yupana: coding
  workflow](https://inkaverse.com/articles/extra/yupana-coding.md):

  Reproduce results from Yupana coding.

- [Yupana](https://inkaverse.com/articles/yupana.md):

  Yupana: experimental design analysis.
